classObjective: Draw and label figures that accurately represent given geometric relationships.
workedExamples: 10-2, Example 3 — Draw and Label Geometric Figures
10-2, Example 4 — Analyze a Three-Dimensional Figure for Planes and Coplanarity
warmUp: Draw two intersecting lines and label them
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: spatial visualization; drawing intersecting/non-intersecting lines and planes; accurate labeling conventions
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice drawing and labeling geometric figures from verbal descriptions
independentPractice: Practice problems drawing accurate geometric figures with correct notation
assessment: Exit ticket: draw and label a figure showing two intersecting planes with a line of intersection
capReflection: What spatial visualization skills are needed to accurately represent 3D relationships in 2D drawings?
